arts.ttl: John Hartson thinks Celtic should do the unthinkable with Daizen Maeda for Bayern Munich clash
arts.sum: Hartson stated on Go Radio that Rodgers should play Maeda down the middle, with Jota on the left and Kuhn on the right. When Maeda was supposed to be suspended for this first leg, the notion was that the returning Jota would play on the left, Adam Idah down the middle and Nicolas Kuhn on the right.

arts.ttl: Thomas Muller has personal Celtic incentive as Bayern Munich icon eyes Champions League history
arts.sum: The German icon is on the verge of making history with the Bundesliga giants

arts.ttl: Celtic target REFUSES to celebrate goal amid failed transfer attempt
arts.sum: Celtic target refuses to celebrate goal amid failed transfer attempt.

arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer pinpoints Celtic danger man and what Bayern Munich have 'worked on'
arts.sum: “We know the player who played in Bayern’s second team, Kuhn,” Neuer said. Neuer picked out Celtic’s Nicolas Kuhn as the main threat

arts.ttl: Celtic could consign Bayern Munich to unwanted European record if Brendan Rodgers banishes seven year hoodoo
arts.sum: The German giants have endured a rollercoaster Champions League campaign this season

arts.ttl: Karl-Heinz Rummenigge expresses Celtic 'surprise' and raises one question ahead of Bayern Munich tie
arts.sum: The 2025 Champions League final will take place in Munich, so it’s added pressure for the German club to ensure they reach Europe’s biggest stage on their home turf. Over the weekend, Celtic beat Raith Rovers to progress in the Scottish Cup, but it’s fair to say that knockout football in the Champions League is a different animal altogether.

arts.ttl: Alan McInally can truly see both sides of Bayern munich vs. Celtic
arts.sum: “The fact all my former clubs are facing each other in the Champions League this season is really special for me,” McInally told FCBayern.com . Alan McInally played for Bayern Munich and Celtic during his playing career, scoring 17 goals for the Scots and 10 for the Bavarians.

arts.ttl: The ultimate Celtic XI for Bayern Munich clash as Maeda is IN but what does that mean for Jota and Kuhn?
arts.sum: How will Celtic line up against Bayern tonight? Brendan Rodgers has already given us a big indicator...

arts.ttl: Auston Trusty is 'happy' Celtic star is on his side after UEFA's call ahead of Bayern Munich clash
arts.sum: Daizen Maeda available to play for Celtic against Bayern Munich in the Champions League The one big dampener for Celtic heading into the Bayern game was the fact that Daizen Maeda was suspended after picking up a two-match ban for getting sent off against Young Boys.

arts.ttl: How 8 VIPs see Celtic vs Bayern playing out as Parkhead factor made clear but loudmouth German duo confident
arts.sum: It's the latest big European night under the lights at Parkhead and the big names have all delivered their views
